university: The University of Texas at Austin

pitching.description: Championship-caliber pitching demands an ERA under 3.50 and a K/BB ratio above 2.5.

hitting.description: Offensive production must sustain a .280+ team average with power-speed balance.

fielding.description: Defensive excellence demands a .975+ fielding percentage.

baserunning.description: Aggressive but disciplined baserunning with 78%+ success rate.

coachingPhilosophy.identity: Pitching and defense win championships. Offense must be disciplined and situational.
coachingPhilosophy.recruiting: Prioritize Texas high school talent, supplement with elite national and international players.
coachingPhilosophy.development: Build depth through player development. Every roster spot must earn its place.
coachingPhilosophy.competition: Schedule and compete against the best. Championship teams are forged in difficult environments.
